---
title: "About"
---

## The module

**Spatial Epidemiology and Applied Data Science** is the spatial module of the **DMgtAsia**
course. It consolidates and adapts material refined across **multiple spatial data science
trainings and workshops delivered across India**, packaged here as a self-paced / intensive
workshop with hands-on R exercises and auto-graded quizzes.

## Authors

- **Prof. (Dr.) Biju Soman** — Achutha Menon Centre for Health Science Studies, SCTIMST, Trivandrum
- **Dr. Arun Mitra** — AIIMS Bibinagar

## Source & licence

Source repository: <https://github.com/drarunmitra/DMgtAsia_Spatial_Module>

Teaching materials are released under **CC-BY-SA**; code under **MIT**, unless noted otherwise.
Datasets remain under their original licences (NMC, NFHS, WHO, SEDAC GPWv4, `HistData`).

## Acknowledgements

Built on the open-source `sf`, `spdep`, `rgeoda`, `exactextractr`, `tidygeocoder`,
`ggspatial` and `tidyverse` ecosystems, and on the cartographic guidance of the CDC GeoSWG.
